# Project Name


# Overview


## Project Name

Source: https://test.com/

Logo Styles Core Appwrite Local Data Utilities Light Dark System English French Spanish


# About


## About Us — Project Name

Source: https://test.com/about

About Us Tests: localized baked content + data-hydrate island. Baked: About Us (should be locale-correct after prerender) Contact: Email / Phone data-hydrate island — not baked, evaluated at runtime Current locale: en Home title (live): Home Counter: 0 +1 x-markdown test — content below should be visible as static HTML Test Article This is a prerender test article rendered from markdown. Item one Item two Item three Section Two Paragraph content to verify markdown rendering survives prerender. ← Back to Home Popup A Popup B Toggle Channels


# Blog


## Blog — Project Name

Source: https://test.com/blog

Blog Tests static x-for list prerendering — items should be baked as static HTML for SEO. ← Back to Home Popup A Popup B Toggle Channels

## À propos de nous — Project Name

Source: https://test.com/fr/about

À propos de nous Tests: localized baked content + data-hydrate island. Baked: À propos de nous (should be locale-correct after prerender) Contact: Email / Téléphone data-hydrate island — not baked, evaluated at runtime Current locale: en Accueil title (live): Accueil Counter: 0 +1 x-markdown test — content below should be visible as static HTML Test Article This is a prerender test article rendered from markdown.
